title: Flowchart of Interrupt Enable/Disable Control Logic
description: A flowchart depicting the CPU's decision-making process when an interrupt request (IRQ) arrives, highlighting the critical role of the Interrupt Enable (IE) flag.
relationships: IRQ signal is received by CPU
CPU checks the state of the IE flag
If IE=0, interrupt is ignored and main program continues
If IE=1, current instruction finishes, then ISR is executed
ISR execution ends with a Return From Interrupt (RTI) instruction
